original_statement: what is the number of fans who attended the october 7th game against millwall this season?
mutated_statement: what is the number of people who did something at the october 7th something against a certain side this season?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 动作模糊化 + 事件类型泛化 + 对手匿名化: “fans”被泛化为“people” | “attended”被模糊为“did something” | “game”被替换为占位词“something” | “millwall”被替换为模糊指代“a certain side” (fans→people | attended→did something | game→something | millwall→a certain side)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中直接断言的内容识别关键信息：judge_thought写到“the question refers to the match on October 7, 1950... row 13 shows '7 oct 1950 | millwall ... 13,129'”，并且operation记录显示执行了select_row/select_column和simple_query返回“13,129”。Agent未在任何位置提到问题存在模糊或泛化（没有使用ambiguous、unclear、need clarification等词），也未向用户反问或请求更多信息。Agent的具体表现是直接把泛化问题当作明确的“October 7 vs Millwall”来处理并给出具体数值答案，因此符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
